description: Estonian online speech therapy platform providing interactive exercises for speech and language impediments. Created by experienced speech therapists, helps patients overcome speech challenges from home while saving time and costs for therapists.
business_model: B2B - Platform to speech therapists and healthcare providers
target_market: Speech therapists, patients with speech impediments
competitive_advantage: Wide range of exercises, suitable for both children and adults, therapist-created content

varden_fit.rationale: Specialized therapeutic platform - potential integration point for occupational health referrals
